summary: The diff implements compact ProjectCard changes in frontend/src/components/ProjectCard.tsx. All major REQ-12 acceptance criteria appear to be addressed: thumbnail reduced to h-24 (~96px), padding tightened (px-3, pt-2, pb-1), title font reduced to text-sm, description line-clamped to 1 line, date rows use text-xs with gap-0.5 spacing. Status badge remains positioned top-right and card click navigation is preserved. The grid density change (3-4+ cards per row) would depend on Dashboard.tsx grid configuration which is not shown modified, but the card compactness itself enables this.
